subcodes.first_line: O my God, the All-Merciful and the Omnipotent over all contingent being! I beseech Thee, by Thy Self, to protect the sovereign and deliver him from that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی الرحمن و المقتدر علی الامکان اسئلک بنفسک بان تحفظ السلطان و تخلصه عما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
